column1:
1. To create a smart platform that helps hostel students quickly locate nearby essential services without relying on others.
2.To bring multiple local services like laundry,medical and barber shops onto one platform, making it easier for students to search and choose what they need in less time.
3.To build a simple and easy-to-use system so that any student can access information without confusion or technical knowledge.
4.To ensure reliable and updated information by user reviews and feedback
